description_long: This object is a bottle with a cylindrical body and a short, slightly tapered neck, topped with a flat, rounded cap. The surface appears to be made of unfinished or lightly sanded wood, giving it a natural, matte appearance with visible wood grain and some subtle color variation. On the front, there is a rectangular white label with blue text, featuring the words 'ELIXIR VEGETAL' and additional details, suggesting it is modeled after a medicinal or herbal elixir bottle. The label is affixed to the lower half of the bottle, and the rest of the surface is unadorned. The bottle's form is simple and utilitarian, with no visible seams or additional decorative elements. There are no visible signs of damage, and the cap appears to be integrated as part of the same material.
description: A wooden bottle with a cylindrical body, short neck, and a flat cap, featuring a white label with blue text on the front. The surface is matte with visible wood grain and natural color variation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white label with blue text and the full cylindrical shape of the bottle.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible, highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted wooden surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain wooden surface with no label or markings, emphasizing the bottle's natural wood grain.
description_view_3: Angled side view with the edge of the label just visible, displaying the bottle's rounded neck and cap.
attribute_label_or_branding: A rectangular white label with blue text reading 'ELIXIR VEGETAL de la Grande-Chartreuse' and additional details, placed on the front lower half of the bottle.
